data.description: US: US Treasury Secretary Bessent met with European Commissioner Dombrovskis.

data.title: US government increasingly relies on AI, but challenges emerge due to public doubts. AI use surges but faces obstacles.
data.description: In recent times, the US government has quickly implemented AI technology, with a noticeable rise in skepticism towards both the technology itself and government agencies.

data.title: Despite cease-fire, Iran's hackers remain active, seeking advantage in the conflict through continuing cyberspace operations.
data.description: The cyber operatives in Tehran are actively working to gain an edge in the ongoing conflict through a new phase of digital operations.

data.title: Pentagon asks Ford and G.M for aid to lower costs and speed up weapons production, engaging in talks for manufacturing parts.
data.description: Pentagon officials are in discussions with General Motors and Ford Motor due to concerns about the slow pace and high cost of weapons production. The talks revolve around the possibility of having certain parts manufactured by the two companies to address these issues.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: Discussed critical minerals with Italy's Economy Minister Giorgetti

data.title: Alcoa Stock Drops After Q1 Results Fall Short: Details
data.description: Alcoa Corp. (NYSE: AA) released its first-quarter earnings report after Thursday's market close, falling short of analyst expectations on both revenue and profit margins. The company's quarterly earnings were reported at $1.40 per share, below the anticipated $1.49 per share as per Benzinga Pro data. Alcoa attributed the results to increased profitability driven by higher aluminum prices. However, quarterly revenue stood at $3.19 billion, failing to meet the estimated $3.3 billion. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com. Check out the latest movement of AA stock prices.

data.title: Adams Natural Resources Fund Announces First Quarter 2026 Performance
data.description: Adams Natural Resources Fund, Inc. disclosed its investment performance for the first quarter of 2026 in Baltimore. The Fund reported a total return of 32.3% on its net asset value during this period, factoring in reinvested dividends and capital gains. In comparison, the S&P 500 Energy Sector saw a return of 38.3%, while the S&P 500 Materials Sector yielded 9.7%. The Fund's benchmark, composed of 80% S&P 500 Energy Sector and 20% S&P 500 Materials Sector, delivered a return of 32.6%. Additionally, the total return on the Fund's market price for the same timeframe stood at 30.3%.

data.title: Adams Diversified Equity Fund Announces First Quarter 2026 Performance
data.description: Adams Diversified Equity Fund, Inc. (NYSE: ADX) revealed its investment performance for Q1 2026, reporting a -4.8% total return on net asset value with reinvested dividends and capital gains. In comparison, the S&P 500 Index and Morningstar U.S. Large Blend category had -4.3% and -4.4% total returns, respectively, during the same period. Additionally, the Fund's market price saw a -4.2% total return.

data.title: Cohen & Steers Reports Results for First Quarter 2026
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Cohen & Steers, Inc. (NYSE: CNS) announced its financial results for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The company's earnings report for the first quarter of 2026 can be accessed on their website.
US: US Treasury Secretary Bessent met with UK's Chancellor Reeves yesterday.

data.title: Arcosa, Inc. Announces Timing of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Arcosa, Inc. (NYSE: ACA) revealed that it will unveil its first-quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2026 after the market closes on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The company, known for providing infrastructure products and solutions, will conduct an earnings call to review these results at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on Friday, May 1, 2026. Access to the call can be obtained through a webcast and slide presentation available at https://ir.arcosa.com.

data.title: W. R. Berkley Corporation Names Christopher T. Reichardt President of Berkley Oil & Gas
data.description: In Greenwich, Conn., W. R. Berkley Corporation (NYSE: WRB) has named Christopher T. Reichardt as the new president of Berkley Oil & Gas, succeeding Linda A. Eppolito, who is now the chair of the business. The appointments are effective immediately. With over 20 years of experience in the oil and gas insurance sector, Reichardt spent more than 15 years at Berkley Oil & Gas and previously held the position of senior vice president and chief before this promotion.

data.title: Starwood Property Trust Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: In Miami Beach, Florida, on April 16, 2026, Starwood Property Trust (NYSE: STWD) revealed plans to disclose its Q1 2026 financial outcomes on May 8, 2026, before the New York Stock Exchange opens. There will be a conference call following the release.

data.title: Select Water Solutions Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend of $0.07 Per Share
data.description: In Gainesville, Texas on April 16, 2026, Select Water Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: WTTR) disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend. Select is a prominent supplier of sustainable water and chemical solutions to the energy sector. The specific dividend amount or additional details were not provided in the announcement.

data.title: Marine Products Corporation Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In Atlanta on April 16, 2026, Marine Products Corporation (NYSE: MPX) revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2026 on Thursday, May 7, 2026, prior to market launch. Marine Products Corporation operates as...

data.title: CNO Financial Group to Release First Quarter Results on April 30, 2026
data.description: CARMEL, Indiana - On April 16, 2026, CNO Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE: CNO) announced that they will be releasing their first quarter 2026 results after the market closes on Thursday, April 30, 2026. Following this, they will be conducting a conference call to address and discuss these results at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time on Friday, May 1, 2026. This call is anticipated to provide insights into the company's performance during this quarter and will be open to investors, analysts, and the media.

data.title: APAA Applauds 10% Increase in Domestic Aluminum Production at Century Mt. Holly Due to Trump's National Security Tariffs
data.description: A recent announcement from the American Primary Aluminum Association (APAA) hails the decision made by Century Aluminum to recommence operations at an inactive potline situated in their Mt. Holly smelter in Goose Creek, South Carolina. This move has involved a substantial financial commitment, with a noteworthy investment of $65 million in the domestic aluminum industry.

data.title: MGP Ingredients to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Wednesday, April 29, 2026
data.description: ATCHISON, Kan.--MGP Ingredients, Inc., a prominent company in branded and distilled spirits as well as food ingredient solutions, is set to disclose its first quarter 2026 financial results before the Nasdaq market opens on Wednesday, April 29. President and CEO Julie Francis, along with CFO Brandon Gall, will lead a conference call at 10 a.m. ET on the same day to review the results, offer a business overview, and address inquiries. data.title: loanDepot, Inc. to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 5, 2026
data.description: loanDepot, Inc., based in Irvine, California, announced that they will be releasing their financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on May 5, 2026. The company has scheduled this report to provide insights into their performance during this period. This update is eagerly anticipated by investors and analysts who are keen to assess loanDepot's financial health and growth. It signifies an important milestone for the company as stakeholders look to evaluate the organization's progress and future prospects.

data.title: Fair Isaac Corporation Announces Date for Reporting of Second Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Global analytics software leader FICO, listed on the NYSE under the symbol FICO, is set to report its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026 on April 28, 2026, post market closure. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 4:30 p.m. Eastern time, with alternative timings for other time zones – 3:30 p.m. Central and 1:30 p.m. Pacific. Interested parties can access the webcast of the call on FICO’s investor website at www.fico.com/investors. For those unable to join the live call, a replay will be accessible on the Event Calendar under Past Events until April 28, 2027.
